---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in Nextflow-Agentic-UI
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, paste relevant logs from:
- The FastAPI backend (`docker compose logs backend`)
- The Nextflow log file (`pipeline/logs/<workflow_id>.log`)
- The browser console

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04]
- Docker version: [e.g. 24.0]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 124]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.
